name: SOUTHERN CO
summary: Southern Company is a leading energy company serving the southeastern United States. It operates through traditional electric utilities (Alabama Power, Georgia Power, Mississippi Power), Southern Power (competitive generation), and Southern Company Gas (natural gas distribution via Nicor Gas, Atlanta Gas Light, Virginia Natural Gas, and Chattanooga Gas). The company provides electric generation, transmission, distribution, and natural gas distribution services to residential, commercial, and industrial customers.

products.name: Electric Generation and Distribution
products.description: Electric power generation, transmission, and distribution through Alabama Power, Georgia Power, and Mississippi Power.

products.name: Natural Gas Distribution
products.description: Natural gas distribution services via Nicor Gas, Atlanta Gas Light, Virginia Natural Gas, and Chattanooga Gas.

products.name: Competitive Wholesale Generation
products.description: Southern Power provides competitive wholesale electric generation including solar, wind, and battery storage.

products.name: Southern Linc Wireless
products.description: Wireless communications services provided by Southern Communications Services, Inc., doing business as Southern Linc.

products.name: PowerSecure Services
products.description: Energy solutions and distributed infrastructure services provided by PowerSecure, Inc.

products.name: Retail Natural Gas Marketing
products.description: SouthStar Energy Services markets retail natural gas in Georgia as a certificated Marketer.

partnerships.description: Co-owner of Plant Vogtle Units 3 and 4 as part of the Vogtle Owners group.

partnerships.partner_name: Municipal Electric Authority of Georgia (MEAG Power)
partnerships.description: Co-owner of Plant Vogtle Units 3 and 4 as part of the Vogtle Owners group.
Co-owner of Plant Vogtle Units 3 and 4 as part of the Vogtle Owners group.
50% owned by each of Alabama Power and Georgia Power for joint generation purposes.
Southern Company Gas holds a 50% ownership interest in this pipeline system.
Southern Company Gas holds a 50% undivided ownership interest in this Georgia pipeline facility.
Georgia Power entered a loan guarantee agreement with DOE for Plant Vogtle Units 3 and 4 construction financing.
